name: ads
tagline: Paid-ads strategy assistant for Google/Meta/LinkedIn/X campaigns — targeting, budgets, creative, retargeting, and RSA generation.
verdict: Well-built advisory skill: versioned, reference-routed by intent, concrete budget/scaling rules, sibling-skill pointers, worked ad-copy and RSA examples. Weak spots are minor: the dispatch description is one dense run-on paragraph, and only RSA generation has a defined output contract — general strategy answers stay free-form.

highlights.summary: Output contract defined only for Google RSA generation (references/rsa-output-spec.md, line 424); general strategy/consulting answers have no defined deliverable shape.
description (line 3) is ~710 chars, one dense run-on sentence stacking dozens of trigger keywords; informative but not sized sensibly.
